adventuring_gear.name: Abacus
adventuring_gear.description: A calculating tool.

adventuring_gear.name: Acid (vial)
adventuring_gear.description: As an action, you can splash the contents of this vial onto a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. Make a ranged attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d6 acid damage.

adventuring_gear.name: Alchemist's Fire (flask)
adventuring_gear.description: As an action, throw up to 20 feet. On a hit, target takes 1d4 fire damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature can end this with a DC 10 Dexterity check as an action.

adventuring_gear.name: Alchemist's Supplies
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for alchemy.

adventuring_gear.name: Ammunition - Arrows (20)
adventuring_gear.description: Standard arrows for use with bows.

adventuring_gear.name: Ammunition - Blowgun Needles (50)
adventuring_gear.description: Needles for use with a blowgun.

adventuring_gear.name: Ammunition - Crossbow Bolts (20)
adventuring_gear.description: Bolts for use with crossbows.

adventuring_gear.name: Ammunition - Sling Bullets (20)
adventuring_gear.description: Bullets for use with a sling.

adventuring_gear.name: Antitoxin (vial)
adventuring_gear.description: A creature that drinks this vial of liquid gains advantage on saving throws against being poisoned for 1 hour.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus - Crystal
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus - Orb
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus - Rod
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus - Staff
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus - Wand
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for arcane spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Backpack
adventuring_gear.description: Holds up to 30 pounds or 1 cubic foot of gear.

adventuring_gear.name: Bagpipes
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)
adventuring_gear.description: As an action, you can spill these on a level area 10 feet square. A creature moving through the area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

adventuring_gear.name: Barrel
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 40 gallons of liquid or 4 cubic feet of solid material.

adventuring_gear.name: Basket
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 2 cubic feet or 40 pounds of gear.

adventuring_gear.name: Bedroll
adventuring_gear.description: A portable sleeping roll.

adventuring_gear.name: Bell
adventuring_gear.description: A small bell.

adventuring_gear.name: Blanket
adventuring_gear.description: A warm blanket.

adventuring_gear.name: Block and Tackle
adventuring_gear.description: A set of pulleys with a cable threaded through them. Doubles carrying weight via pulley system.

adventuring_gear.name: Book
adventuring_gear.description: A book might contain poetry, historical accounts, information pertaining to a particular field of lore, diagrams and notes on gnomish contraptions, or just about anything else that can be represented using text or pictures.

adventuring_gear.name: Bottle, glass
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 1.5 pints of liquid.

adventuring_gear.name: Brewer's Supplies
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for brewing.

adventuring_gear.name: Bucket
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 3 gallons of liquid or half a cubic foot of solid material.

adventuring_gear.name: Calligrapher's Supplies
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for calligraphy.

adventuring_gear.name: Caltrops (bag of 20)
adventuring_gear.description: As an action, you can spread a bag of caltrops to cover a 5-foot-square area. Any creature that enters the area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or stop moving and take 1 piercing damage. Until the creature regains at least 1 hit point, its walking speed is reduced by 10 feet.

adventuring_gear.name: Candle
adventuring_gear.description: For 1 hour, a candle sheds bright light in a 5-foot radius and dim light for an additional 5 feet.

adventuring_gear.name: Carpenter's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for carpentry.

adventuring_gear.name: Cartographer's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for mapmaking.

adventuring_gear.name: Case, crossbow bolt
adventuring_gear.description: This wooden case can hold up to 20 crossbow bolts.

adventuring_gear.name: Case, map or scroll
adventuring_gear.description: This cylindrical leather case can hold up to 10 rolled-up sheets of paper or 5 rolled-up sheets of parchment.

adventuring_gear.name: Chain (10 feet)
adventuring_gear.description: A chain has 10 hit points, AC 20. It can be burst with a DC 20 Strength check.

adventuring_gear.name: Chalk (1 piece)
adventuring_gear.description: A piece of chalk.

adventuring_gear.name: Chest
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 12 cubic feet or 300 pounds of gear.

adventuring_gear.name: Climber's Kit
adventuring_gear.description: Includes special pitons, boot tips, gloves, and a harness. You can use the climber's kit as an action to anchor yourself; when you do, you can't fall more than 25 feet from the point where you anchored yourself.

adventuring_gear.name: Clothes, common
adventuring_gear.description: Common clothing.

adventuring_gear.name: Clothes, costume
adventuring_gear.description: Costume clothing for disguise or performance.

adventuring_gear.name: Clothes, fine
adventuring_gear.description: Fine clothing.

adventuring_gear.name: Clothes, traveler's
adventuring_gear.description: Sturdy clothing for travel.

adventuring_gear.name: Cobbler's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for shoemaking.

adventuring_gear.name: Component Pouch
adventuring_gear.description: A small, watertight leather belt pouch that has compartments to hold all the material components and other special items you need to cast your spells, except for those with a specific cost.

adventuring_gear.name: Cook's Utensils
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for cooking.

adventuring_gear.name: Crowbar
adventuring_gear.description: Using a crowbar grants advantage to Strength checks where the crowbar's leverage can be applied.

adventuring_gear.name: Dice Set
adventuring_gear.description: A set of gaming dice.

adventuring_gear.name: Disguise Kit
adventuring_gear.description: This pouch of cosmetics, hair dye, and small props lets you create disguises that change your physical appearance. Proficiency with this kit lets you add your proficiency bonus to ability checks to create a visual disguise.

adventuring_gear.name: Dragonchess Set
adventuring_gear.description: A dragonchess set.

adventuring_gear.name: Druidic Focus - Sprig of Mistletoe
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for druid spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Druidic Focus - Totem
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for druid spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Druidic Focus - Wooden Staff
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for druid spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Druidic Focus - Yew Wand
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for druid spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Drum
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Dulcimer
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Fishing Tackle
adventuring_gear.description: This kit includes a wooden rod, silken line, corkwood bobbers, steel hooks, lead sinkers, velvet lures, and narrow netting.

adventuring_gear.name: Flask or Tankard
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 1 pint of liquid.

adventuring_gear.name: Flute
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Forgery Kit
adventuring_gear.description: This small box contains a variety of papers and parchments, pens and inks, seals and sealing wax, gold and silver leaf, and other supplies necessary to create convincing forgeries of physical documents.

adventuring_gear.name: Glassblower's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for glassblowing.

adventuring_gear.name: Grappling Hook
adventuring_gear.description: When tied to the end of a rope, the grappling hook can anchor the rope to various objects.

adventuring_gear.name: Hammer
adventuring_gear.description: A standard hammer.

adventuring_gear.name: Hammer, sledge
adventuring_gear.description: A sledgehammer.

adventuring_gear.name: Healer's Kit
adventuring_gear.description: This kit has ten uses. As an action, you can expend one use to stabilize a creature that has 0 hit points, without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

adventuring_gear.name: Herbalism Kit
adventuring_gear.description: This kit contains a variety of instruments such as clippers, mortar and pestle, and pouches and vials used by herbalists to create remedies and potions. Proficiency lets you add your proficiency bonus to checks for identifying or applying herbs.

adventuring_gear.name: Holy Symbol - Amulet
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for divine spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Holy Symbol - Emblem
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for divine spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Holy Symbol - Reliquary
adventuring_gear.description: A spellcasting focus for divine spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Holy Water (flask)
adventuring_gear.description: As an action, you can splash the contents on a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet (shatters on impact). Make a ranged attack against the target. If the target is a fiend or undead, it takes 2d6 radiant damage.

adventuring_gear.name: Horn
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Hourglass
adventuring_gear.description: A standard hourglass.

adventuring_gear.name: Hunting Trap
adventuring_gear.description: When you use your action to set it, this trap forms a saw-toothed steel ring that snaps shut when a creature steps on a pressure plate. A creature must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 piercing damage and stop moving. A creature can use its action to make a DC 13 Strength check to free itself.

adventuring_gear.name: Ink (1 ounce bottle)
adventuring_gear.description: A bottle of ink.

adventuring_gear.name: Ink Pen
adventuring_gear.description: An ink pen.

adventuring_gear.name: Jeweler's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for jewelry crafting.

adventuring_gear.name: Jug or Pitcher
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 1 gallon of liquid.

adventuring_gear.name: Ladder (10 feet)
adventuring_gear.description: A 10-foot wooden ladder.

adventuring_gear.name: Lamp
adventuring_gear.description: A lamp casts bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Burns 1 pint of oil for 6 hours.

adventuring_gear.name: Lantern, Bullseye
adventuring_gear.description: A bullseye lantern casts bright light in a 60-foot cone and dim light for an additional 60 feet. Burns 1 pint of oil for 6 hours.

adventuring_gear.name: Lantern, Hooded
adventuring_gear.description: A hooded lantern casts bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Burns 1 pint of oil for 6 hours. As an action, you can lower the hood to reduce to 5-foot dim light.

adventuring_gear.name: Leatherworker's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for leatherworking.

adventuring_gear.name: Lock
adventuring_gear.description: A key is provided with the lock. Without the key, a creature proficient with thieves' tools can pick this lock with a successful DC 15 Dexterity check.

adventuring_gear.name: Lute
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Lyre
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Magnifying Glass
adventuring_gear.description: Grants advantage on ability checks made to appraise or inspect an item that is small or highly detailed. Can also substitute for flint and steel to start a fire (requires light, 5 minutes).

adventuring_gear.name: Manacles
adventuring_gear.description: These metal restraints can bind a Small or Medium creature. Escaping the manacles requires a DC 20 Dexterity check. Breaking them requires a DC 20 Strength check. A DC 15 Dexterity check with thieves' tools can pick the lock.

adventuring_gear.name: Mason's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for masonry.

adventuring_gear.name: Mess Kit
adventuring_gear.description: This tin box contains a cup and simple cutlery. The box clamps together and can also serve as a cooking pan.

adventuring_gear.name: Mirror, steel
adventuring_gear.description: A steel mirror.

adventuring_gear.name: Navigator's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: This set of instruments is used for navigation at sea. Proficiency lets you chart a ship's course and follow navigation charts.

adventuring_gear.name: Oil (flask)
adventuring_gear.description: Oil usually comes in a clay flask that holds 1 pint. You can splash oil on a creature within 5 feet or throw it up to 20 feet. If the target takes fire damage before the oil dries (1 minute), it takes an additional 5 fire damage from the burning oil. 1 pint of oil burns for 6 hours in a lamp or lantern.

adventuring_gear.name: Painter's Supplies
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for painting.

adventuring_gear.name: Pan Flute
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Paper (one sheet)
adventuring_gear.description: A sheet of paper.

adventuring_gear.name: Parchment (one sheet)
adventuring_gear.description: A sheet of parchment.

adventuring_gear.name: Perfume (vial)
adventuring_gear.description: A vial of perfume.

adventuring_gear.name: Pick, miner's
adventuring_gear.description: A miner's pick.

adventuring_gear.name: Piton
adventuring_gear.description: A piton for climbing.

adventuring_gear.name: Playing Card Set
adventuring_gear.description: A deck of playing cards.

adventuring_gear.name: Poison, basic (vial)
adventuring_gear.description: You can use the poison in this vial to coat one slashing or piercing weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. Applying the poison takes an action. A creature hit by the poisoned weapon or ammunition must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or take 1d4 poison damage. Once applied, the poison retains potency for 1 minute before drying.

adventuring_gear.name: Poisoner's Kit
adventuring_gear.description: A poisoner's kit includes the vials, chemicals, and other equipment necessary for the creation of poisons. Proficiency lets you add your proficiency bonus to ability checks to craft or use poisons.

adventuring_gear.name: Pole (10 feet)
adventuring_gear.description: A 10-foot wooden pole.

adventuring_gear.name: Pot, iron
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 1 gallon of liquid.

adventuring_gear.name: Potion of Healing
adventuring_gear.description: You regain 2d4+2 hit points when you drink this potion.

adventuring_gear.name: Potter's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for pottery.

adventuring_gear.name: Pouch
adventuring_gear.description: A cloth or leather pouch can hold up to 20 sling bullets or 50 blowgun needles. A pouch holds 1/5 cubic foot or 6 pounds of gear.

adventuring_gear.name: Quiver
adventuring_gear.description: A quiver can hold up to 20 arrows.

adventuring_gear.name: Ram, portable
adventuring_gear.description: You can use a portable ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you advantage on this check.

adventuring_gear.name: Rations (1 day)
adventuring_gear.description: Dried food suitable for extended travel. Enough for one person for one day.

adventuring_gear.name: Robes
adventuring_gear.description: Standard robes.

adventuring_gear.name: Rope, Hempen (50 feet)
adventuring_gear.description: 50 feet of hempen rope. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.

adventuring_gear.name: Rope, Silk (50 feet)
adventuring_gear.description: 50 feet of silk rope. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.

adventuring_gear.name: Sack
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 1 cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear.

adventuring_gear.name: Scale, merchant's
adventuring_gear.description: A scale includes a small balance, pans, and a suitable assortment of weights up to 2 pounds.

adventuring_gear.name: Sealing Wax
adventuring_gear.description: Sealing wax for letters.

adventuring_gear.name: Shawm
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Shovel
adventuring_gear.description: A shovel.

adventuring_gear.name: Signal Whistle
adventuring_gear.description: A signal whistle.

adventuring_gear.name: Signet Ring
adventuring_gear.description: A signet ring bearing a personal seal.

adventuring_gear.name: Smith's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for smithing.

adventuring_gear.name: Soap
adventuring_gear.description: A bar of soap.

adventuring_gear.name: Spellbook
adventuring_gear.description: Essential for wizards. This leather-bound tome has 100 blank vellum pages suitable for recording spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Spikes, iron (10)
adventuring_gear.description: Ten iron spikes.

adventuring_gear.name: Spyglass
adventuring_gear.description: Objects viewed through a spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

adventuring_gear.name: Tent, two-person
adventuring_gear.description: A simple, portable canvas shelter that sleeps two.

adventuring_gear.name: Thieves' Tools
adventuring_gear.description: This set of tools includes a small file, a set of lock picks, a small mirror mounted on a metal handle, a set of narrow-bladed scissors, and a pair of pliers.

adventuring_gear.name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
adventuring_gear.description: A Three-Dragon Ante card set.

adventuring_gear.name: Tinderbox
adventuring_gear.description: This small container holds flint, fire steel, and tinder used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a torch takes an action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

adventuring_gear.name: Tinker's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for tinkering.

adventuring_gear.name: Torch
adventuring_gear.description: A torch burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. If you make a melee attack with a burning torch and hit, it deals 1 fire damage.

adventuring_gear.name: Vial
adventuring_gear.description: Holds 4 ounces of liquid.

adventuring_gear.name: Viol
adventuring_gear.description: A musical instrument.

adventuring_gear.name: Waterskin
adventuring_gear.description: Holds up to 4 pints of liquid. A full waterskin weighs 5 lbs.

adventuring_gear.name: Weaver's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for weaving.

adventuring_gear.name: Whetstone
adventuring_gear.description: A whetstone for sharpening blades.

adventuring_gear.name: Woodcarver's Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Artisan's tools for woodcarving.
